reference: My ten-month-old has had a low-grade fever for the past three days and has been suffering from diaper rash this past week due to teething and diarrhea. I just changed her diaper, and she became very upset when I wiped her. I also noticed a pink hue on her wipe. What should I do?
text: My ten-month-old has had a low-grade fever for the past three days and has been suffering from diaper rash this past week due to teething and diarrhea. I just changed her diaper, and she became very upset in the wheelchair. I also noticed a wound on the leg. What should I do?
